/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/browser.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/browser.dir/src/dom.cpp.o CMakeFiles/browser.dir/src/layout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/browser.dir/src/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/browser.dir/src/scripting.cpp.o CMakeFiles/browser.dir/src/network.cpp.o -o browser  -Wl,-rpath,/home/shravani/browser/browser-minus-minus/build/_deps/sdl3_ttf-build:/home/shravani/browser/browser-minus-minus/build/_deps/sdl3-build _deps/sdl3_ttf-build/libSDL3_ttf.so.0.2.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/liblua5.4.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so -lpthread _deps/sdl3-build/libSDL3.so.0.2.0
